mapper.insert: insert into chat_rooms(room_id, room_name, creator_id, required_members, current_members, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{roomId}, #{roomName}, #{creator.id}, #{requiredMembers}, #{currentMembers}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update chat_rooms
room_name = #{roomName},
creator_id = #{creator.id},
required_members = #{requiredMembers},
current_members = #{currentMembers},
status = #{status},
update chat_rooms set status = #{status} where room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: select * from chat_rooms where room_id = #{roomId} and status = #{status}
